name: Official Bash Validator
author: anthropics
description: Official Claude Code example demonstrating how to validate bash commands before execution. Blocks dangerous commands with configurable rules.

name: Claude Code Hooks Mastery
author: disler
description: 13+ hooks covering the full lifecycle: pre-compact context injection, subagent monitoring, session-start logging, and PostToolUse tracking.

name: Hooks Starter Pack
author: karanb192
description: Safety, formatting, and notification hooks for everyday use: block dangerous commands, auto-format code after edits, and send desktop alerts.

name: Claude Code Hooks Library
author: CodyLunders
description: 60+ hooks across security, code quality, git workflow, productivity, and logging. A comprehensive reference for building your own hook system.

name: Multi-Agent Observability
author: disler
description: Real-time monitoring for multi-agent workflows: PostToolUse event logging, session tracking, and event visualization for debugging agentic pipelines.

name: Notification Hooks
author: gjohnsx
description: Cross-platform desktop notification hooks for macOS, Linux, and Windows. Get alerted when Claude needs your attention without watching the terminal.

name: Claude Code Showcase
author: ChrisWiles
description: End-to-end project config combining hooks, skills, agents, and GitHub Actions. Demonstrates Stop hooks for post-session automation.

name: Infrastructure Showcase Hooks
author: diet103
description: 6 production-ready hooks including skill activation triggers, post-tool usage tracking, and context injection for infrastructure-focused projects.

name: Basic Context Injection Hook
author: ronaldeddings
description: Simple SessionStart hook that injects critical context into every new session. A great starting point for hook beginners.

name: TypeScript Claude Hooks
author: johnlindquist
description: TypeScript-based hooks with full type safety and strongly-typed payloads. Validate bash commands before execution with type-checked matchers.
